title: ERROR 1265 (01000): Data truncated for column '%s' at row %d
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```SQL
CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 TEXT);
INSERT INTO t1 VALUES ('a');
UPDATE t1 SET c1 = CAST('61QW' AS DECIMAL);
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
The error message should not have the %s, %d.
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
```SQL
ERROR 1265 (01000): Data truncated for column '%s' at row %d
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v7.0.0
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 7376954cd868dbc44fc3015c9ef89c53749339a7
Git Branch: heads/refs/tags/v7.0.0
UTC Build Time: 2023-03-29 13:32:13
GoVersion: go1.20.2
Race Enabled: false
TiKV Min Version: 6.2.0-alpha
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 INT, c2 DECIMAL(5,2), c3 VARCHAR(10));
UPDATE t2 SET c2 = CAST('123.4567' AS DECIMAL(5,2));
UPDATE t2 SET c3 = CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(5,2));
UPDATE t2 SET c1 = CAST('abc' AS SIGNED);
key_bug_features: Data truncation during decimal cast in update statement
